title: Stronger Connections
subtitle: Senses and movements develop further
description: By week 22, your baby’s senses continue to develop, and movements become stronger and more coordinated. You may clearly feel kicks and changes in activity levels throughout the day.
what_to_expect: Fetal movements become stronger and more coordinated
Development of senses like touch and hearing continues
You may notice patterns in activity and rest
care_tips: Maintain a balanced and nutrient-rich diet
Stay hydrated and follow regular routines
Practice light exercise and maintain good posture

medical_checkups.note: Routine monitoring continues to ensure healthy development.

commonly_suggested.name: Routine Prenatal Checkup
commonly_suggested.purpose: Monitors maternal health and fetal growth

medical_checkups.guidance: Your doctor will guide you on any additional tests based on your health and earlier reports.

important_note: Stronger movements are a positive sign of your baby’s growth and activity.
reassurance: Feeling regular movements can help you stay connected with your baby’s development.
medical_disclaimer: Consult your healthcare provider if you notice any unusual changes in movement.

diabetes.personalized_description: Maintaining stable blood sugar levels supports ongoing development and activity.
diabetes.medical_focus: Blood sugar levels may be monitored during routine prenatal visits.

anemia.personalized_description: Adequate iron levels support oxygen supply during increased activity and development.
care_tips: Pair with vitamin C for better absorption
anemia.medical_focus: Hemoglobin levels may be monitored during routine tests.
anemia.reassurance: Supporting your nutrition helps maintain your energy levels.

hypertension.personalized_description: Stable blood pressure supports proper circulation during this active stage.
hypertension.medical_focus: Blood pressure monitoring remains important during checkups.
hypertension.reassurance: A calm and steady routine supports your well-being.

thyroid.personalized_description: Balanced thyroid levels support continued growth and metabolic balance.
thyroid.medical_focus: Thyroid function may be monitored during ongoing evaluations.
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency helps maintain a healthy balance.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: As movements and senses develop further, managing multiple conditions requires steady and mindful care.
priority_tips: Avoid sudden dietary or lifestyle changes
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Small, consistent efforts support healthy progress.
